Keywords: trend, time-series, line, growth, timeline, progress
When to Use: Data has a time axis; observe rise/fall trends over a continuous period
When NOT to Use: Fewer than 4 pts (use stat card); no time dimension exists

When to Use: Comparing discrete categories by magnitude; ranking
Accessibility Notes: Value labels on bars by default

Keywords: part-to-whole, pie, donut, percentage, proportion, share
When to Use: <=5 categories; one dominant segment; visual proportion focus
Accessibility Notes: Must provide stacked bar + table fallback

When to Use: Relationship between two variables; clusters or outliers
When NOT to Use: Variables are categorical; fewer than 20 points

When to Use: Intensity/density across a 2D grid; time patterns
When NOT to Use: Fewer than 20 cells; exact values needed
